companies.tagline: Welcome to the Future of Smart Customer Interaction!
companies.description: ALLBOTIX is an advanced robotics company delivering cutting-edge robotic solutions including AI reception robots, humanoid robots, cleaning robots, serving robots, autonomous mobile robots (AMR), and collaborative robot arms (cobots). It empowers industries with smart automation, precision engineering, and limitless innovation.
companies.mission: Empowering tomorrow's industries with cutting-edge robotic solutions. Smart automation, precision engineering, and limitless innovation.
companies.vision: To be the global leader in intelligent robotic automation across commercial, industrial, and service environments.

companies.tagline: Cutting-edge technology solutions across AV, AI, Robotics, and Web Services.
companies.description: Nanta Tech Limited is a comprehensive technology solutions company headquartered in Ahmedabad, India. It operates across four verticals: AV (Audio-Visual) Solutions, AI Solutions, Robotics (via Allbotix brand), and Website Services. The company provides end-to-end AV integration, AI-powered computer vision, intelligent robots, and professional web development services.
companies.mission: To deliver cutting-edge technology solutions that transform businesses with innovation in audio-visual, artificial intelligence, robotics, and digital services.
companies.vision: To be the most trusted technology partner across South Asia for smart enterprise solutions.

divisions.av_division: End-to-end audio-visual products and integration services
divisions.ai_division: Computer vision and AI speech solutions (NTRA brand)
divisions.robotics_division: Full range of intelligent robots for commercial and industrial use (Allbotix brand)
divisions.web_division: Custom website design, development, and maintenance

companies.tagline: Building the Future of Intelligent Vision
companies.description: NTRA is the Computer Vision and AI solutions division of Nanta Tech Limited. It builds real-time AI vision systems that turn cameras into intelligent platforms for detection, analytics, and operational decision-making. NTRA combines Computer Vision, Deep Learning, and Edge AI to deliver fast, secure, scalable enterprise systems for surveillance, monitoring, security, and operational intelligence.
companies.mission: To transform existing camera infrastructure into intelligent operational platforms using enterprise-grade edge AI, with full data sovereignty and zero compromise on privacy.
companies.vision: To be the leading edge AI vision platform for enterprise security, safety, and operational intelligence across critical industries.

technical_specs.integration: REST APIs, Webhooks, VMS, SOC, SCADA, BMS, BI tools

key_features: Runs on existing IP/RTSP cameras — no rip-and-replace
On-prem edge AI — no video leaves the network
Audit-grade event logs with timestamped clips
Commodity GPU edge appliances (~100 cameras per cluster)
